title: Sideroxylon verruculosum
taxonomy: Sideroxylon verruculosum is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is classified within the genus Sideroxylon, which is a group of evergreen trees and shrubs. Sideroxylon verruculosum is also known by other names, including the scaly plum tree. This species is part of the larger family of sapote plants, which are known for their edible fruits and timber.
